name: Date-Butterscotch Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup All-purpose flour (if using self-rising flour, omit baking powder and salt)
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees. Grease square pan, 8 X 8 X 2 inches.
Heat shortening in a saucepan over low heat until melted; remove from heat.
Mix in brown sugar, vanilla and egg. Stir in remaining ingredients.
Spread in pan. Bake for 25 minutes. Cut into 2-inch squares while warm. Makes 16 Brownies, with 145 Calories per Brownie.
